ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Passenger class (1, 2, 3) */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Sex (0 for male, 1 for female) */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the passenger */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid by the passenger */,
  "family_cnt" INTEGER /* Number of family members traveling with the passenger */,
  "cabin_ind" INTEGER /* Cabin indicator (0 for no cabin, 1 for cabin) */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Survival status (0 for did not survive, 1 for survived) */,
  "embarked" TEXT /* Port of embarkation */,
  "disembarked" TEXT /* Port of disembarkation */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Any pre-existing medical conditions */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the passenger */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the passenger */,
  "hair_color" TEXT /* Hair color of the passenger */,
  "eye_color" TEXT /* Eye color of the passenger */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the passenger */,
  "destination" TEXT /* Destination of the passenger */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "families" (
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family */,
  "head_of_family_id" INTEGER /* ID of the head of the family */,
  "family_size" INTEGER /* Total number of family members */,
  "relation_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., parent, child, sibling) */,
  "family_income" REAL /* Income of the family */,
  "family_ occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the family */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_families_head_of_family_id FOREIGN KEY ("head_of_family_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cabins" (
  "cabin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cabin */,
  "cabin_number" TEXT /* Cabin number */,
  "deck" TEXT /* Deck location (A, B, C, etc.) */,
  "cabin_type" TEXT /* Type of cabin (e.g., single, double, suite) */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger assigned to the cabin */,
  "cabin_location" TEXT /* Location of the cabin (e.g., forward, aft, midship) */,
  "cabin_size" REAL /* Size of the cabin (in square feet) */,
  "cabin_amenities" TEXT /* Amenities in the cabin (e.g., bathroom, shower, balcony) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cabin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cabins_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fares" (
  "fare_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fare */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "fare_amount" REAL /* Amount of fare paid */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the fare */,
  "surcharge" REAL /* Surcharges applied to the fare */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., cash, check, credit card) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of payment (e.g., paid, pending, refunded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fare_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fares_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ports" (
  "port_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each port */,
  "port_name" TEXT /* Name of the port */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the port */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the port is located */,
  "port_code" TEXT /* Code of the port */,
  "port_type" TEXT /* Type of port (e.g., embarkation, disembarkation, transit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical record */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Pre-existing medical conditions */,
  "treatment_received" TEXT /* Treatments received before the journey */,
  "onboard_treatment" TEXT /* Any medical treatments received onboard */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the passenger */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Allergies of the passenger */,
  "medications" TEXT /* Medications taken by the passenger */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_records_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crew" (
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the crew member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role on the ship (e.g., captain, steward, engineer) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the crew member */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Sex (0 for male, 1 for female) */,
  "embarked" TEXT /* Port of embarkation */,
  "disembarked" TEXT /* Port of disembarkation */,
  "crew_position" TEXT /* Position of the crew member */,
  "crew_department" TEXT /* Department of the crew member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survivor_accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survivor account */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "account_text" TEXT /* Text of the survivor account or interview */,
  "interview_date" TEXT /* Date of the interview */,
  "interviewer" TEXT /* Name of the interviewer */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., written, oral, video) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survivor_accounts_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "document_title" TEXT /* Title of the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., passenger list, ship manifest) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_format" TEXT /* Format of the document (e.g., PDF, CSV, JPEG) */,
  "document_size" REAL /* Size of the document (in bytes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, historian, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed (e.g., passenger_id, document_id) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_status" TEXT /* Status of access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survival_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survival factor */,
  "factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the survival factor (e.g., class, age, gender) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the survival factor */,
  "factor_type" TEXT /* Type of survival factor (e.g., demographic, environmental) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survival_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survival analysis */,
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survival factor */,
  "survival_rate" REAL /* Survival rate (percentage) */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size of the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survival_analysis_factor_id FOREIGN KEY ("factor_id") REFERENCES survival_factors ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "embarkation_dates" (
  "embarkation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each embarkation event */,
  "port_id" INTEGER /* ID of the port */,
  "embarkation_date" TEXT /* Date of embarkation */,
  "embarkation_time" TEXT /* Time of embarkation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("embarkation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_embarkation_dates_port_id FOREIGN KEY ("port_id") REFERENCES ports ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disembarkation_dates" (
  "disembarkation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disembarkation event */,
  "port_id" INTEGER /* ID of the port */,
  "disembarkation_date" TEXT /* Date of disembarkation */,
  "disembarkation_time" TEXT /* Time of disembarkation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disembarkation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disembarkation_dates_port_id FOREIGN KEY ("port_id") REFERENCES ports ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_ports" (
  "passenger_port_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger-port relationship */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "embarkation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the embarkation event */,
  "disembarkation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disembarkation event */,
  "port_code" TEXT /* Code of the port */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_port_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_ports_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_ports_disembarkation_id FOREIGN KEY ("disembarkation_id") REFERENCES disembarkation_dates ("disembarkation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_ports_embarkation_id FOREIGN KEY ("embarkation_id") REFERENCES embarkation_dates ("embarkation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_survival_factors" (
  "psf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger-survival factor relationship */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survival factor */,
  "factor_value" TEXT /* Value of the survival factor for the passenger */,
  "factor_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the survival factor (e.g., years, meters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("psf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_survival_factors_factor_id FOREIGN KEY ("factor_id") REFERENCES survival_factors ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_survival_factors_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_documents" (
  "pd_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger-document relationship */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., passenger list, ship manifest) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pd_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_documents_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_documents_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES documents ("document_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_fares" (
  "pf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger-fare relationship */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "fare_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fare */,
  "fare_amount" REAL /* Amount of the fare */,
  "fare_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the fare (e.g., USD, GBP) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_fares_fare_id FOREIGN KEY ("fare_id") REFERENCES fares ("fare_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_fares_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_cabins" (
  "pc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger-cabin relationship */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "cabin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cabin */,
  "cabin_number" TEXT /* Number of the cabin */,
  "cabin_deck" TEXT /* Deck of the cabin (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_cabins_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_cabins_cabin_id FOREIGN KEY ("cabin_id") REFERENCES cabins ("cabin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ship_info" (
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the ship */,
  "ship_name" TEXT /* Name of the ship */,
  "ship_type" TEXT /* Type of ship (e.g., passenger, cargo) */,
  "ship_length" REAL /* Length of the ship (in meters) */,
  "ship_beam" REAL /* Beam of the ship (in meters) */,
  "ship_draft" REAL /* Draft of the ship (in meters) */,
  "ship_gross_tonnage" REAL /* Gross tonnage of the ship */,
  "ship_speed" REAL /* Speed of the ship (in knots) */,
  "ship_capacity" INTEGER /* Passenger capacity of the ship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voyage_info" (
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the voyage */,
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ship */,
  "departure_date" TEXT /* Date of departure */,
  "arrival_date" TEXT /* Date of arrival */,
  "departure_port" TEXT /* Departure port */,
  "arrival_port" TEXT /* Arrival port */,
  "voyage_distance" REAL /* Distance of the voyage (in nautical miles) */,
  "voyage_duration" REAL /* Duration of the voyage (in days) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voyage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voyage_info_ship_id FOREIGN KEY ("ship_id") REFERENCES ship_info ("ship_id")
)
